title: To Miss Vera Beringer
content:
There was a young lady of station
�I love man� was her sole exclamation
But when men cried, �You flatter�
She replied, �Oh! no matter
Isle of Man is the true explanation.�
meaning:
This evocative piece by Lewis Carroll, titled "To Miss Vera Beringer", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...
